places.name: Alishan Station
places.address: 祝山林道, 中正村, 阿里山鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Main forest railway station and hub of the Alishan National Forest Recreation Area

places.name: Zhushan Sunrise Platform
places.address: 祝山林道, 神木村, 信義鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Hilltop viewing platform for Alishan's famous sunrise over a sea of clouds

places.name: Giant Tree Trail
places.address: 巨木群棧道(二), 香林村, 阿里山鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Loop trail through ancient cypress and cedar trees, including the 3,000-year-old Sacred Tree stump

places.name: Shuishan Giant Tree
places.address: 水山步道, 中山村, 阿里山鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Separate 2,700-year-old red cypress, quieter than the main Giant Tree Trail

places.name: Shouzhen Temple
places.address: 祝山林道支線, 香林村, 阿里山鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Main Taoist temple in the forest recreation area, ornate and well-kept

places.name: Mianyue Line Trail
places.address: 塔山登山步道, 中正村, 阿里山鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Hike along the old Mianyue Forest Railway route through misty old-growth forest

places.name: Duegaoyue Trail
places.address: 對高岳步道, 神木村, 信義鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Less-crowded alternative sunrise hiking trail, 1–2 hours, fewer crowds than Zhushan
